message:
fix: add WebSocket ping/pong keepalive to prevent connection FD leak (#3286)

kc-agent was accumulating hundreds of CLOSED file descriptors from dead
WebSocket connections. Without ping/pong, ReadJSON blocks forever on
half-open TCP connections (browser tab crash, network drop), preventing
defer conn.Close() from ever running. BroadcastToClients also blocked
on dead connections without write deadlines, stalling all clients.

- Add ping/pong keepalive (30s ping, 60s pong timeout) to handleWebSocket
- Set read deadline reset on pong and on each application message
- Add write deadline to BroadcastToClients, remove dead clients on error
- Active streaming unaffected: browsers respond to pings at protocol level

Signed-off-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
